# ESA WorldCover S2 RGBNIR Composite

Sentinel-2 median Red-Green-Blue-NIR composite at 10m resolution.

## File

`ESA_WorldCover_10m_2021_v200_N46E008_S2RGBNIR.tif` — 16-bit 4-band COG, EPSG:4326, ~455 MB

4 bands: B04 (Red), B03 (Green), B02 (Blue), B08 (NIR). Values scaled by 10000
(SCALE=0.0001). Tile covers N46 E008 (Swiss Alps, Bernese Oberland region).

## Source

- **Product**: ESA WorldCover 10m v200 — Sentinel-2 RGBNIR composite
- **Provider**: European Space Agency (ESA) / VITO
- **Website**: https://esa-worldcover.org/en/data-access
- **S3 bucket**: `s3://esa-worldcover-s2/rgbnir/`
- **Documentation**: https://esa-worldcover.s3.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/v200/2021/docs/WorldCover_PUM_V2.0.pdf
